scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "cd app && npx nest start --watch" "cd web && npx vite"
scripts.build: cd app && npm run build && cd ../web && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate: cd app && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: cd app && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:reset: cd app && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.test:e2e: cd app && npx vitest run test/e2e --no-file-parallelism
scripts.setup: cd app && npm install && npx prisma db push && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts && cd ../web && npm install
